env_files.role: Latest campaign update with authoritative copy, replacements, and priority order
Current Instagram Story size, safe-area, hierarchy, density, and placement constraints
Current brand palette, design rules, hero requirements, and forbidden styles
Allowed current logo, hero, icon, badge, or helper assets
Deprecated copy, colors, claims, logos, templates, and plausible wrong assets that must not be active
Compact current brand context replacing the poorly rendered PDF guide

source_policy.web_usage_note: Closed-env case: solve only from env files and task.md; do not use the web.

notes: Lightly optimized design-specification-to-image case with six env files, no PDF dependency, latest-update priority conflict, Instagram Story constraints, current palette resolution, allowed assets, and deprecated exclusions.
